title: U.S. Rep. Eric Burlison announces constituent services visits
description: U.S. Rep. Eric Burlison, of Missouri's Seventh District, has announced a districtwide Constituent Services Week effort, June 1-5.

title: Galatasaray accuse referees of having 'evil inside' them
description: Galatasaray accuse referees in Turkey of having "evil inside" them just days after suspending relations with the Turkish Football Federation.

title: LAPD officer, 2 children hurt in Crenshaw crash
description: A Los Angeles police officer and two young children were injured in a crash early Sunday morning in the Baldwin Hills/Crenshaw area, authorities confirmed. The collision was reported around 3:23 a.m. near Crenshaw Boulevard and Obama Boulevard, according to the Los Angeles Police Department. Officials say the crash involved an LAPD patrol vehicle. title: Cardinals Bullpen Wastes McGreevy’s Epic Start as Mariners Win 3-2
description: Michael McGreevy gave the St. Louis Cardinals a crucial quality start and JJ Wetherholt and Nathan Church provided the power, but the bullpen wasted all of it as the Mariners pulled out a late inning victory 3-2. Both Emerson Hancock for the Mariners and Michael McGreevy for the Cardinals gave their teams strong starts Sunday. [...]

title: Bruins Fall Behind 3-1 In Series After 6-1 Loss At Home
description: The Boston Bruins loss game four 6-1 against the Buffalo Sabres.
